decisions.rationale: IR re-read (bTHDb____root.json) confirms bTHDa siblings ai_RNbBKLUl, ai_RNbBKLUm, and ai_RNbBHXid should be full-width header above a sidebar+main row. DashboardLayout still nests Header in the right column for shadcn SidebarProvider + mobile SidebarTrigger — same structural gap deferred at SHELL-05 C-1 and SHELL-06 C-1. SHELL-07 scope requires mounting page-instance bubble ids and journal-main boundary, not layout restructure; all four named ui_refs pass ui_evidence and AC-1/AC-2/AC-3 pass. Downstream JOURNAL-01 (MOD-DRSAM-JOURNAL) depends_on SHELL-07 for the ai_RNbBHXid content slot and ownership marker, not full-width header span. Reconcile layout in a shell layout polish pass when SHELL-08+ page shells batch consistent chrome structure.

Brownfield retention of prototype journal CRUD UI and editor/delete dialogs inside ai_RNbBHXid is intentional and satisfies SHELL-07 AC-3: the content slot is bounded by data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHXid with data-module-owner MOD-DRSAM-JOURNAL, and page-level dialogs render outside the journal-main boundary per layout_notes. Decompose scope 'popups and journal widgets out of scope' means this item must not implement the journal-main IR subtree — that work is explicitly assigned to MOD-DRSAM-JOURNAL (JOURNAL-01+). Coverage preflight already records prototype widget retention. Replacing with a minimal placeholder would regress working brownfield UI without blocking downstream gates.

JOURNAL_ROUTE in frontend/src/lib/journal/routes.ts is not yet imported by authenticatedRoutes.tsx, which hardcodes '/journal'. Routing works correctly (AC-1 pass, FV-1 pass); this is single-source-of-truth hygiene only, analogous to SHELL-06 C-3 (DASHBOARD_ROUTE import) deferred as routing polish. No downstream depends_on gate requires the constant import before advance. Consolidate when touching shell routing for SHELL-08+ page routes.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, no blockers, all ACs and ui_evidence pass. Deferred: C-1 full-width header sibling layout vs shadcn column nesting (inherited SHELL-05 gap, shell layout polish); C-3 JOURNAL_ROUTE import DRY (routing hygiene, batch with SHELL-08+). Accepted: C-2 brownfield prototype journal widgets and dialogs with MOD-DRSAM-JOURNAL ownership marker per scope boundary.
